title: Slack search_messages
description: Search across all messages you can see.

query.description: Search query. Supports Slack operators: use from:me for your own messages (NOT from:@me), plus from:@username, in:#channel, after:2024-01-01, has:link. Combine with keywords.

sort.description: Sort by relevance (score, default) or recency (timestamp).

page.description: Result page to fetch (1-based) when the total exceeds count.
